title: Inet datatype handling inconsistent between int, cast( as inet) and string
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(col inet NOT NULL, id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY);
INSERT INTO test_table(col) VALUES(CAST('192.168.1.3' AS inet));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE col = '192.168.1.1';
key_bug_features: Inconsistent inet datatype handling for different input formats
